Voluptuous Virtuosity: Busnoys and Ockeghem, ca. 1465

Cut Circle and the students of "Performance as Analysis: Late-Medieval Music in Action" (Music 159J)
Jesse Rodin, director
Memorial Church, Stanford University
Wednesday 13 January 2016, 7:30 p.m. 

PROGRAM

Je m’esbaïs de vous mon cuer Antoine de Busnes, dit “Busnoys” 

 (ca. 1432–1490)

Michela Macfarlane, discantus 

Steven Soph, contratenor

Bradford Gleim, tenor

 

Missa Ecce ancilla domini Johannes Ockeghem

Kyrie (d. 1497)

Gloria

In hydraulis Busnoys

Maintes femmes Busnoys

 

A vous sans aultre Busnoys

Students of Music 159J

Students of Music 159J

Carolann Buff, discantus

Steven Soph, contratenor altus

Bradford Gleim, tenor

Paul Max Tipton, contratenor bassus

Michela Macfarlane, discantus 

Carolann Buff, discantus 

Herbert Myers, vielle

Missa Ecce ancilla domini Ockeghem

Credo

Quant vous me ferez Busnoys

A qui vens tu tes coquilles Busnoys

Students of Music 159J

Carolann Buff, discantus

Bradford Gleim, tenor

Paul Max Tipton, contratenor bassus

Michela Macfarlane, discantus 

Carolann Buff, discantus 

Paul Max Tipton, contratenor bassus

Missa Ecce ancilla domini Ockeghem

Sanctus

Students of Music 159J


Terrible dame Busnoys

Michela Macfarlane, discantus 

Carolann Buff, tenor 

Steven Soph, tenor

Bradford Gleim, bassus

Herbert Myers, vielle

Missa Ecce ancilla domini Ockeghem

Agnus Dei
